_comment: Ground-truth probe expectations for shark.jpg on the jet-ski-cruise scene. Paths relative to this file (assets/). NOTE: shark_appears is expected TRUE (a shark fin IS in the frame) but the small/soft fin currently reads as a dolphin on the 12B VLM, so this assertion documents a KNOWN false negative — it will FAIL until a clearer frame or stronger model. The invariants below are the robust must-stay-clean checks.
